description:
Marble It Up! Ultra is a marble platforming game made by the minds behind the Marble Blast series. 
Roll through an extensive single-player campaign filled with dangerous obstacles, mind-bending paths, shifting gravity, bouncy floors, and potent power-ups.

v0.1.1-alpha.description:
**NOTABLE:** Added an in-game tracker to the level select! You can now see what levels require which powerups and abilities.
**NOTABLE:** Adding onto above, you will now be notified if you enter a level without proper items (though you can still play.)

**APWORLD:** A few logic changes.
- `Wave Pool`, `Hyperloop`, `Glacier`, `Triple Divide`, `Epoch`, `Crystalline Matrix`, and `Retrograde Rally` no longer require any items for *base* completion. Silver Medal completion and higher will still logically require their items.
- `Onward and Upward` no longer requires Boost for *base* completion. Super Jump and Gravity Surfaces are still needed. Silver Medal completion and higher will still logically require Boost.
- `River Vantage` now requires Boost for all completion levels.

**APWORLD:** Default Death Link amnesty has been changed from 10 to 5. Be careful!
**CLIENT:** Being crushed will now count towards Death Link.
**CLIENT:** Medal Unlock text will now pluralize properly.
v0.1.1-alpha.title: ArchipelagoMIUU Alpha v0.1.1
